blocks.text: Norwegian Classics Assault: Abrahamsen and Hoelgaard Eye E3 Saxo Classic Glory

Tuesday is all about cobbles and Norwegian ambition. E3 Saxo Classic fires up at 11:52 on the Belgian roads, with Jonas Abrahamsen and Markus Hoelgaard carrying Norwegian hopes — a warm-up for Sunday's Gent-Wevelgem showdown.
🚴 E3 Saxo Classic 2026 — Abrahamsen & Hoelgaard go for Belgian glory at 11:52
🎾 Dubrovnik Open (ATP 250) — Clay court action begins at 05:00, no top stars in the draw
